MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff 609-611 Burnett Apartments, is present. Represented by John Lavrich
Attorney, David Wasserman, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Stephen Weber, is present.
Attorney, Eric Lifschitz , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-24-2010 is vacated.
